info.title: VinMake ERP API
info.description: RESTful API for VinMake ERP — garment manufacturing management platform. Covers production orders, costing, BOM, procurement, billing, and more.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api V1 Api Keys Get

get.description: Get bank statement by ID with lines.

schema.title: Response List Versions Api V1 Bom  Bom Id  Versions Get
Response List Line Items Api V1 Bom Versions  Version Id  Line Items Get

get.description:
List Direct Cost Purchase Orders with pagination, filtering, and sorting.

**Filtering:**
- `status`: Filter by PO status (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled)
- `supplierId`: Filter by supplier ID

**Sorting:**
- Prefix with `-` for descending, `+` or no prefix for ascending
- Supported fields: `created_at`, `document_id`, `status`, `order_date`

**Search:**
- Searches in document_id field

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "data": [...],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 45,
    "totalPages": 5,
    "hasNext": true,
    "hasPrev": false
  }
}
```

post.description:
Create a new Direct Cost Purchase Order.

Use PATCH /{document_id} to update an existing PO.

**Actions:**
- `draft`: Save as draft without validation (incomplete data allowed)
- `submit`: Save with full validation (all required fields must be set)

**Required fields for submit:**
- supplierId: Supplier reference
- orderDate: Order date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
- items: At least one line item with category, uom, orderQty, unitPrice

get.description:
Get a single Direct Cost Purchase Order by document ID.

Returns full PO details including:
- Supplier information
- All line items with material details
- Cost summary (subtotal, tax, total)
- Audit information (creator, dates)

patch.description:
Update an existing Direct Cost PO (creates a new version).

All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.
The document_id comes from the URL path, not the request body.

**Actions:**
- `draft`: Save changes as draft
- `submit`: Submit with full validation
- `approve`: Approve the PO (Manager/Admin only)
- `reject`: Reject the PO (Manager/Admin only)
- `cancel`: Cancel the PO

**State Transitions:**
- Draft → Draft, Submitted
- Submitted → Approved, Rejected, Draft
- Approved → Cancelled
- Rejected → Draft

delete.description:
Hard delete a Direct Cost Purchase Order and all its versions.

**Requires:** Manager or Admin role

**Warning:** This action cannot be undone. CASCADE delete removes:
- All versions
- All line items

get.description:
List Fixed Cost Purchase Orders with pagination, filtering, and sorting.

**Filtering:**
- `status`: Filter by PO status (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled)
- `expenseCategory`: Filter by expense category (utilities, rent, services, etc.)
- `frequency`: Filter by frequency (one_time, monthly, quarterly, yearly)

**Sorting:**
- Prefix with `-` for descending, `+` or no prefix for ascending
- Supported fields: `created_at`, `document_id`, `status`

**Search:**
- Searches in document_id field

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "data": [...],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 45,
    "totalPages": 5,
    "hasNext": true,
    "hasPrev": false
  }
}
```

post.description:
Create a new Fixed Cost Purchase Order.

Use PATCH /{document_id} to update an existing PO.

**Actions:**
- `draft`: Save as draft without validation (incomplete data allowed)
- `submit`: Save with full validation (all required fields must be set)

**Required fields for submit:**
- Either `vendorId` OR `employeeId` (not both, not neither)
- `purpose`: Purpose of the expense
- `expenseCategory`: Category (utilities, rent, services, maintenance, supplies, other)
- `frequency`: Frequency (one_time, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
- `items`: At least one line item with itemName and amount

get.description:
Get a single Fixed Cost Purchase Order by document ID.

Returns full PO details including:
- Vendor or employee information
- All line items with expense details
- Cost summary (subtotal, tax, total)
- Audit information (creator, dates)

patch.description:
Update an existing Fixed Cost PO (creates a new version).

All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.
The document_id comes from the URL path, not the request body.

**Actions:**
- `draft`: Save changes as draft
- `submit`: Submit with full validation
- `approve`: Approve the PO (Manager/Admin only)
- `reject`: Reject the PO (Manager/Admin only)
- `cancel`: Cancel the PO

**State Transitions:**
- Draft → Draft, Submitted
- Submitted → Approved, Rejected, Draft
- Approved → Cancelled
- Rejected → Draft

delete.description:
Hard delete a Fixed Cost Purchase Order and all its versions.

**Requires:** Manager or Admin role

**Warning:** This action cannot be undone. CASCADE delete removes:
- All versions
- All line items

get.description: Retrieve a production line by ID.

patch.description: Flip the active flag on a production line.

post.description:
Create a new sales order or update existing (creates new version).

**Actions:**
- `draft`: Save as draft
- `submit_for_review`: Submit for approval

**Creating new vs updating:**
- Omit `id` to create a new order
- Provide `id` (document_id) to create a new version of existing order

get.description:
Get a single sales order by document ID.

Returns full order details including:
- Line items
- Version history (all previous versions with change descriptions)

patch.description:
Update a sales order (creates a new version).

All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

**Actions:**
- `draft`: Keep as draft
- `submit_for_review`: Submit for approval
- `confirm`: Confirm order (Manager/Admin only)
- `reject`: Reject order (Manager/Admin only)
- `mark_in_procurement`: Mark as in procurement
- `mark_in_production`: Mark as in production
- `mark_delivered`: Mark as delivered

delete.description:
Hard delete a sales order and all its versions.

**Warning:** This action cannot be undone.

core__pagination__PaginationInfo.title: PaginationInfo
core__pagination__PaginationInfo.description:
Pagination metadata following API standards.

Attributes:
    page: Current page number (1-indexed)
    limit: Items per page
    total: Total number of items matching query
    totalPages: Total number of pages
    hasNext: Whether there is a next page
    hasPrev: Whether there is a previous page
